description: Determines the sub-genre style for a fantasy world setting.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the sub-genre style for a fantasy world setting.

entries.result: High Fantasy: This is a fantasy world where fantasy elements are common. There is plenty of magic, monsters, myths, quests, kings and queens, nations and wars. Epic stuff

resultTranslations.en: High Fantasy: This is a fantasy world where fantasy elements are common. There is plenty of magic, monsters, myths, quests, kings and queens, nations and wars. Epic stuff

entries.result: Dark Fantasy: This is fantasy combined with horror. Stories told here should often tend toward the frightening and threatening

resultTranslations.en: Dark Fantasy: This is fantasy combined with horror. Stories told here should often tend toward the frightening and threatening

entries.result: Sword & Sorcery: This is a variety of High Fantasy with an emphasis on thrilling battles, danger, adventure, and heroic individual achievement

resultTranslations.en: Sword & Sorcery: This is a variety of High Fantasy with an emphasis on thrilling battles, danger, adventure, and heroic individual achievement

entries.result: Historical Fantasy: This is fantasy couched in an era of the real world of the past, or at least adjacent to it. It may actually be the historical real world, but with magic or other fantasy elements

resultTranslations.en: Historical Fantasy: This is fantasy couched in an era of the real world of the past, or at least adjacent to it. It may actually be the historical real world, but with magic or other fantasy elements

entries.result: Modern: It's our current, contemporary world, or even one in the future, with fantasy elements combined with it

resultTranslations.en: Modern: It's our current, contemporary world, or even one in the future, with fantasy elements combined with it

entries.result: Grimdark: These are dystopian and dark fantasy settings with plenty of violence and ambiguous morality

resultTranslations.en: Grimdark: These are dystopian and dark fantasy settings with plenty of violence and ambiguous morality

entries.result: Low Fantasy: These fantasy worlds favor realism with just a touch of fantasy. Magic and monsters tend to be rare but of great consequence

resultTranslations.en: Low Fantasy: These fantasy worlds favor realism with just a touch of fantasy. Magic and monsters tend to be rare but of great consequence

entries.result: Steampunk: This is similar to Modern, but set in a Victorian era style world where clockwork technology combines with magic

resultTranslations.en: Steampunk: This is similar to Modern, but set in a Victorian era style world where clockwork technology combines with magic

entries.result: Fairy-Tale: This fantasy world is based on an actual fairy-tale or its fantasy is fairy-tale-like, relying on folklore and mythology

resultTranslations.en: Fairy-Tale: This fantasy world is based on an actual fairy-tale or its fantasy is fairy-tale-like, relying on folklore and mythology

entries.description: Roll on Mythic's Action Meaning tables and include them with the other Meaning words rolled to make your interpretation

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll on Mythic's Action Meaning tables and include them with the other Meaning words rolled to make your interpretation
